untranslatable_reason: Signal references a 'predictive model' that generates custom prediction scores (-0.3 threshold). This is an external ML/algorithmic model output not derived from the allowed technical indicators. The prediction_threshold of -0.3 cannot be mapped to standard price/indicator data. Source text confirms '+1 or -1' model predictions but provides no formula or indicator basis for these predictions.
translation_notes: The signal is fundamentally dependent on an external predictive model not accessible through standard technical indicators. To implement this signal, you would need to: (1) define the ML model's logic separately, (2) generate prediction scores as a custom data feed, (3) then apply the entry/exit threshold rules shown. Current structure assumes prediction scores are available as input; entry/exit thresholds of -0.3 are preserved but cannot be validated against allowed indicators.
